lead: Your new **Astro Systems** site is **live** — rebuilt as a fast, **secure** site that finally works on phones, with your five systems, a clear way to request a quote, and tap-to-call front and centre.

The honest picture: your old site was tiny so it already loaded quickly — but it ran over plain HTTP (browsers flagged it **"Not Secure"**), didn't work on a phone, and gave visitors no real way to reach you. We fixed exactly that. On our own website audit the site went from a **D to an A**, with the parts that actually cost you customers — accessibility, mobile, and the ability to convert a visitor — all jumping to **A**. It's a one-time build — **you own every account.**
ownershipIntro: Right now the accounts sit under our setup so we could build it for you. Transfer is by invite or a fresh key you create — never a shared password.

accounts.name: Hosting — Cloudflare Pages
accounts.own: → we invite your owner email, then we step off. You own the live site.

accounts.name: Contact form — Web3Forms
accounts.own: → generate your own key at web3forms.com using info@astrosystems.ca and we paste it in, so requests go straight to you.

accounts.name: Domain — astrosystems.ca
accounts.ref: already yours (currently on the old HTTP site)
accounts.own: → stays yours; we point it at the new (secure) site when you approve (see cutover below).

accounts.name: Site code
accounts.own: → no GitHub needed on your side; handed over on request. One-time build, no retainer.

editSteps: This site was built **without a separate CMS login** — so there’s nothing new to learn and no monthly CMS seat.
All your content (the five systems, copy, phone numbers, FAQs) lives in one file in the site’s code.
To change anything — wording, a new phone number, a holiday note — send the update to us and we publish it; it’s a quick edit + redeploy.
Want real project photos on the page? Send them over and we’ll place them.
Prefer to self-edit later? We can add a simple CMS (Storyblok) as a one-time add-on so you can edit and publish yourself.

finishingSteps.title: 1 · Point your domain (astrosystems.ca) at the new site
finishingSteps.body: Your web address stays exactly the same — we just aim it at the new, secure site. **Zero downtime:** the old site stays live until you approve this link, then we cut over. This also gives astrosystems.ca **HTTPS for the first time**, ending the "Not Secure" warning. The move is two small DNS records at your registrar — **we do it for you in about 5 minutes** once you tell us where the domain is registered and where your email is hosted (so we preserve your @astrosystems.ca email untouched).

finishingSteps.title: 2 · Send quote requests to your own inbox
finishingSteps.body: The form is live now. Generate a free Web3Forms key at web3forms.com using info@astrosystems.ca, send it to us, and we’ll swap it in so every quote request lands directly in your inbox instead of ours.

finishingSteps.title: 3 · Optional — add real photos & self-serve editing
finishingSteps.body: Two easy add-ons whenever you’re ready: real project photography placed throughout the site, and a simple CMS so you can edit and publish content yourself. Neither is needed for launch.

notes: **The big win is trust, not speed.** Your old page was fast only because it was nearly empty and stuck in the 90s — and it ran over insecure HTTP, so every browser warned visitors it was "Not Secure." The new site is served over **HTTPS automatically**, works on every phone, and looks like the modern smart-home company you actually are. We're not quoting a "seconds faster" number, because that wouldn't be honest.

**Your brand, kept.** Your **ASTRO SYSTEMS logo** sits in the header and footer, and we reused your real product photos (the wiring panels, wall plates, ceiling speakers and security keypad) in a "gear we install" section — paired with a premium navy + copper home-technology design instead of the clip-art splash page.

**The gaps we closed.** HTTPS, a mobile-responsive layout, tap-to-call (phone + toll-free), a working **"Request a quote" form** (emails on submit), proper ElectricalContractor + LocalBusiness structured data, Open Graph link previews, and a privacy notice.

**Real content, no invented details.** Every word is migrated from your own five service pages, and the images are your own; we didn't fabricate reviews, hours, prices, or an address. Your product photos are small originals shown crisply — **higher-resolution or new project photos are an easy next step.**
**Still on the list (easy adds).** Real project photography, your Google Business Profile + reviews if you set them up, and self-serve content editing (a simple CMS) if you'd like it.
footer: Astro Systems · Calgary, Alberta · Built by Studio0rbit · one-time build, no retainer
